visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A fair-skinned woman with long dark hair, wearing a patterned bucket hat and a white lace-sleeved black dress, stands in a brightly lit warehouse supermarket aisle. She holds a large, transparent plastic-sealed food container filled with various ingredients like sliced meat and mushrooms. She smiles and gestures towards the camera. The background features long rows of refrigerated display cases filled with packaged goods. (2) The scene shifts to an indoor living room where the woman, now wearing a black beret, sits at a wooden table alongside another woman with long dark hair. They hold up clear plastic bags containing soup base and clams. The lighting is warm and domestic. (3) A top-down close-up view of the opened food container shows a variety of ingredients being pointed at by a hand, including white mushrooms, sliced ham, clams in plastic, and chopped cabbage. (4) A black pot sits on a stove, containing a simmering hotpot with visible slices of ham, white rice cakes, and mushrooms in a creamy white broth. Steam rises from the boiling liquid. (5) Back to the two women at the table; they use chopsticks and spoons to eat from the black pot. The creator gestures enthusiastically while talking, and her companion listens and nods with a thoughtful expression.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 聽說這個很厲害. (2) [Variety]: 好市多黑馬 胡椒豬肚雞肉鍋. [Subtitle]: 很多人說吃了非常值得. (3) [Subtitle]: 我們來看看它有沒有那麼厲害. (4) [Subtitle]: 因為它一公斤349. (5) [Variety]: 500起跳. [Subtitle]: 所以這一盒都是500起跳. (6) [Subtitle]: 它裡面還有大蛤蜊. (7) [Subtitle]: 但是我不喜歡它竟然是給午餐肉. (8) [Subtitle]: 然後胡椒雞湯也是一大袋. (9) [Subtitle]: 然後以及漂亮的菇菇. (10) [Subtitle]: 煮看看. (11) [Subtitle]: 胡椒豬肚雞肉鍋. (12) [Subtitle]: 那這一盒我們買是511元. (13) [Subtitle]: 裡面有胡椒雞湯. (14) [Subtitle]: 大白菜 蛤蜊 豬肚. (15) [Subtitle]: 馬鈴薯 年糕. (16) [Subtitle]: 午餐肉 還有鴻喜菇. (17) [Subtitle]: 還有12顆蛤蜊. (18) [Subtitle]: 給了兩袋6顆的. (19) [Subtitle]: 那我們現在來加熱看看. [Variety]: GO. (20) [Variety]: 中式湯底. [Subtitle]: 這一鍋神奇的中式湯底. (21) [Subtitle]: 配上韓式的料理. (22) [Subtitle]: 我們覺得很好吃. (23) [Subtitle]: 它湯頭非常濃郁. (24) [Subtitle]: 所以建議大家水可以用更多. (25) [Subtitle]: 或者是在把它來煮火鍋. (26) [Subtitle]: 只可惜它菜的料給的不夠豐富. (27) [Subtitle]: 我們覺得可以再加更多的量. (28) [Subtitle]: 可是它的豬肚超級好吃. (29) [Subtitle]: 超讚. [Variety]: 超讚. (30) [Subtitle]: 而且搭配年糕. (31) [Subtitle]: 因為它的豬肚雞湯底非常的鹹. (32) [Variety]: 非常的胡椒. [Subtitle]: 非常的胡椒. (33) [Subtitle]: 完美的搭配. (34) [Subtitle]: 意外的很搭. (35) [Subtitle]: 如果想要流一點汗. (36) [Subtitle]: 一定要來試試看這一個豬肚雞湯. (37) [Subtitle]: 或者夏天不要開冷氣喔. (38) [Subtitle]: 很熱.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator appearing in all phases, 1 female companion appearing from phase 2 onwards.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A fair-skinned woman with long dark hair, wearing a white lace top over a black dress, a patterned bucket hat (outdoors) and a black beret (indoors).

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large warehouse-style supermarket (Costco) with refrigerated aisles followed by a modern indoor living room with a dining table and home decor.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks rapidly in Mandarin. An upbeat, fast-tempo electronic BGM with a strong beat plays in the background. A sharp 'ding' sound effect punctuates the start. The acoustic environment is a large, open space with slight reverb. (2) The vocal tone remains animated but the background ambience shifts to a quieter indoor room tone. A 'pop' sound effect is heard as a graphic appears. The BGM continues at a consistent volume. (3) A 'whoosh' transition sound effect leads into a descriptive narration segment where the speaker lists ingredients. The speech rate is moderate and clearly enunciated. (4) The sound of liquid simmering and bubbling is briefly audible beneath the BGM and narration. A metallic clink of a spoon against a pot is heard. (5) Two female voices engage in a lively conversation, characterized by high arousal and positive valence. Laughter and affirmative vocalizations are present. The BGM maintains its upbeat tempo until the final note.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook (Product in store) -> Evidence (Ingredient unboxing) -> Process (Cooking demonstration) -> Result (Tasting and verdict).
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video provides a comprehensive review of a specific Costco food product (Pepper Pork Stomach and Chicken Hotpot). It combines on-site footage to show availability and price with a home-based unboxing, cooking, and tasting segment to evaluate the product's quality and taste. The goal is to inform viewers of its value and flavor profile through energetic personal recommendation.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Standard organic food review content structure; no 'sponsored' or 'AD' disclosure present.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-density information delivery with frequent text overlays and energetic vocal delivery typical of social media product reviews.
